Yap about me and the bot:

Wait. Before you cyberbully me in the comments for missing so long. I have an explanation. I'VE BEEN HITTING THE FREAKING GYM!!! рҹ’Әрҹ’Әрҹ’Ә

Oh and also i moved away from my home town and now live all aloneрҹҳ”...

So to cure my depression i made this bot. I mean, who doesn't like femboys? рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲрҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲрҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ
